blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,460 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
